title: Principal Frontend Developer at CDAC Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Principal Frontend Developer at CDAC Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at CDAC Consulting Pvt Ltd. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Surat-based team.

About CDAC Consulting Pvt Ltd:
CDAC Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CDAC Consulting Pvt Ltd!
